title: How to contribute to Linux kernel
description: How to contribute to Linux kernel documents how to contribute material for Linux kernel in the system domain. It is classified as an operation page for the kernel class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Write commit message, Make patch, Set mutt, Send patch mail, and Get maintainer, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include kernel, contribute, how to contribute to linux kernel, linux-kernel, and how-to-contribute, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts.
